Season of Ghosts Macros

Roll Hinterlands Random Encounters.name: 掷骰荒野随机遭遇 Roll Hinterlands Random Encounters
Roll Hinterlands Random Encounters.command:
const table = await fromUuid("Compendium.pf2e-season-of-ghosts-tools.season-of-ghosts-rolltables.RollTable.4VEJ3IeK4nZWXb35");
await table.draw({roll: true, displayChat: true, rollMode: CONST.DICE_ROLL_MODES.PRIVATE});
